gameTitle: Metal Gear Solid: The Twin Snakes

achievements.title: Raison D'être
achievements.description: Listen to all the briefing files, including the two hidden ones
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Nintendo Sensorship
achievements.description: Find the Anti-Personnel Sensor before leaving the Cargo Dock
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Wise-Ass Say...
achievements.description: Tease Mei Ling until she's had enough of you
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Can't Just Knock on the Door and Ask Them to Let Me In
achievements.description: Knock on the door and ask them to let you in
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: They're Going After the Lights!
achievements.description: Take out the searchlights in the Heliport
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: All I Can See is Red
achievements.description: Find the Thermal Goggles before meeting the DARPA Chief
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Sorry to Intrude
achievements.description: Infiltrate the 1F ventilation duct and spy on the guards talking about the intruder
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I'm Not Being Stealthy At All!
achievements.description: Infiltrate the 2F ventilation duct and spy on the guards talking about the intruder
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Spy With My Little Eye
achievements.description: Spy on the guards in both ventilation ducts without ever having been spotted
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Don't Take the Piss, Johnny
achievements.description: Spy on a soldier taking a leak
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Swear, I Did It for the Achievement!
achievements.description: Watch the woman in the cell perform five different workout routines without those pesky pants in the way
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Sorry Things Didn't PAN Out!
achievements.description: Find the DARPA Chief
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Don't Shoot! Think!
achievements.description: Defeat the soldiers in the holding cells without taking damage or killing anyone on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Rookie Rookie! My Super Rookie Rookie!
achievements.description: Standoff with the soldier in the prison without the SOCOM
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Suppress My Emotions
achievements.description: Collect the suppressor
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: To: Satan. Merry Christmas
achievements.description: Drop a hand grenade down the pit in the armory
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: You're Pretty Good!
achievements.description: Defeat Revolver Ocelot without letting him reload his gun on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Are You Getting Steamed?
achievements.description: Defeat Revolver Ocelot without attacking him directly on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: MROW!
achievements.description: Defeat Revolver Ocelot using lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: You Don't Have What It Takes to Kill Me
achievements.description: Defeat Revolver Ocelot using non-lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Uno Mas
achievements.description: Get the FAMAS in the Armory without triggering an alert
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Beaming With Joy
achievements.description: Get through the laser corridor in the Tank Hangar without using the cigarettes or thermal goggles
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Owe You My Tanks
achievements.description: Destroy the tank using only Chaff Grenades, Socom, M9 and Magazines and without using rations on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: You're The Toughest, Craziest, Hardcore Badass On the Planet!
achievements.description: Take out both gunners in the M1 Tank using lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: You're the Shit!
achievements.description: Take out both gunners in the M1 Tank using non-lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Uh-Oh! The Truck Have Started to Move!
achievements.description: Use a box to hitch a ride
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Maggie Q
achievements.description: Destroy the high-voltage panel in one shot from the Nikita launcher
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Hey, Dum-Dum. You Bring Me Gum-Gum?
achievements.description: Find a Moai
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Hurt Me More!
achievements.description: Defeat the Ninja without taking damage or using weapons of any kind on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Urine Trouble Now
achievements.description: Defeat That Ninja and rescue Dr. Emmerich
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: This Is the Chance of a Lifetime! Show Him What You're Made Of!
achievements.description: Execute the plumber to restore some health
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Nintendomachines, Son!
achievements.description: Test the Gamecube's durability by throwing a hand grenade onto the desk with it
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Now This Is a Topic I Can Get Behind!
achievements.description: Follow Meryl into the bathroom and catch her before she can finish preparing for your arrival
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Stop and Stare
achievements.description: Stare at Meryl for a while
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: It's Etched Into My Memory
achievements.description: Do not doubt Mantis' power! He knows all about you!
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Damn Right I'm Gonna Hit That!
achievements.description: Defeat Psycho Mantis without Snake or Meryl taking damage or going prone on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Busted!
achievements.description: Defeat Psycho Mantis using an alternate method
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Left Alone in My Own World
achievements.description: Defeat Psycho Mantis using lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: No Past. No Future. We Live In the Moment
achievements.description: Defeat Psycho Mantis using non-lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: And They Called It Puppy Love
achievements.description: Lose ownership of your box to a puppy
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Mine Now
achievements.description: Collect or destroy all the claymore mines in the Underground Passage
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Am the Type Who is Liable to Snipe You
achievements.description: Collect the PSG-1 in the armory without triggering an alert
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Woo Loo Loo. Woo Loo Loo
achievements.description: Defeat Sniper Wolf in the Underground Passage without missing a shot on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Always Kill What I Aim At
achievements.description: Defeat Sniper Wolf in the Underground Passage using lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Kept You Waiting, Huh?
achievements.description: Defeat Sniper Wolf in the Underground Passage using non-lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: You Dirty Rat!
achievements.description: Kill rats until the Colonel gets tired of it
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Pain Is Inevitable. Suffering Is Optional
achievements.description: Successfully resist the torture and escape your cell
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Let's Ketchup Later
achievements.description: Escape the cell using Otacon's plan that he didn't bother to tell you, then kick the crap out of the guard to vent your frustrations
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Chickenshit
achievements.description: Escape the cell using your own ingenuity and escape without knocking the guard out
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Tough Enough to Eat Nails and Ask for Seconds
achievements.description: Successfully resist 5 torture sessions and finally receive some help from an unexpected source
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Just Can't Wait to Get On the Road Again
achievements.description: Successfully resist at least 3 torture scenes and escape the cell without ever saving
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Repeat: Do Not Engage the Enemy
achievements.description: Find the camera on a new game file
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Plop Plop, Fizz Fizz, Oh What a Relief It Is
achievements.description: Catch a common cold, then take the cure
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Not a Real Man
achievements.description: Find the Body Armor before reaching the Communications Tower
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Nice to Have a Fan Like You
achievements.description: Answer both of Deepthroat's optional calls
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: How I Learned to Stop Worrying and Love the Bomb
achievements.description: Reach the Communications Tower A Roof with the time bomb still in your inventory on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Don't Mess With Me, I'm the Stair Master!
achievements.description: Climb Communication Tower A without killing anyone or using rations on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: You Rappel Me
achievements.description: Rappel down the wall of Communication Tower A without taking damage on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Bridge the Gap
achievements.description: On the Communication Tower Connecting Bridge, take out the soldiers firing only 3 shots from either the M9 or SOCOM on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Open Sez Me
achievements.description: Open the frozen door in Communication Tower A from the outside
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Hindsight Is 20/20
achievements.description: Destroy the Hind D without using the Stinger on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: When Metal Gear Jumped the Missile
achievements.description: Destroy the Hind D
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Before We Get Started, Does Anybody Wanna Get Out?
achievements.description: Defeat the invisible men in the elevator without using any weapons on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Making the Impossible Possible
achievements.description: Defeat Sniper Wolf in the Snow Field with only headshots and without missing a shot on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: La Femme Nikita
achievements.description: Defeat Sniper Wolf in the Snow Field using only the Nikita missile launcher on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Born On a Battlefield
achievements.description: Defeat Sniper Wolf in the Snow Field using lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: What Are You Fighting For?
achievements.description: Defeat Sniper Wolf in the Snow Field using non-lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Not a Very Uplifting Message
achievements.description: Discover the parachute
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: If Do Right, No Can Defense
achievements.description: Completely destroy the crane in the blast furnace
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: We're on an Express Elevator to Hell! Goin' Down!
achievements.description: Defeat the enemies on the cargo elevator in 20 seconds on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: This is My Real Skin Color!
achievements.description: Learn about Nastasha's past
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Quoth the Master
achievements.description: Listen to a gloomy poem from Master Miller
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: A Murder of Crows
achievements.description: Kill at least 3 crows, then encounter Vulcan Raven in the Warehouse
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: My Thoughts to Your Thoughts
achievements.description: Defeat Vulcan Raven without letting him spot you on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Becawse I Can
achievements.description: Defeat Vulcan Raven using only guns and without using rations on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: That Which is No Longer Needed
achievements.description: Defeat Vulcan Raven using lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: A World I Do Not Wish to Know
achievements.description: Defeat Vulcan Raven using non-lethal means
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Ditch This Job
achievements.description: Find the PAL key in the drainage ditch as one would expect
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Covert Critter
achievements.description: Get the PAL key back from the thieving rat!
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Oh What a Tangled Web We Weave
achievements.description: Learn the truth about what's really going on
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Thanks, PAL!
achievements.description: Input all 3 PAL keys without leaving the Underground Base in one session
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: They Played Us Like a DAMN FIDDLE!!!
achievements.description: Input the PAL codes
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Rex Your Shit
achievements.description: Destroy Metal Gear REX without taking damage on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Tools of the Government
achievements.description: Destroy Metal Gear REX
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Bleeding the Lizard
achievements.description: Defeat Liquid Snake without taking damage with at least 1:00 remaining on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: The Twin Snakes
achievements.description: Defeat Liquid Snake
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Beep Beep, I'm a Jeep
achievements.description: Escape from Liquid Snake in the jeep battle, taking damage no more than three times on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: A Trip to Jupiter
achievements.description: Escape Shadow Moses with Otacon
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: A New Path
achievements.description: Escape Shadow Moses with Meryl
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Foxy Lady
achievements.description: Meet up with Meryl who has taken her love of Foxhound a little too far
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Redd Foxx
achievements.description: Beat up That Ninja dressed in bright red
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Snake. Solid Snake
achievements.description: Complete the game in style
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Can't Say Goodbye To Yesterday
achievements.description: Infiltrate the cargo dock, then find the DARPA Chief without any alerts, weapons or radar on Extreme difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Son, You've Got a Way To Fall
achievements.description: After reaching the Nuclear Warhead Storage Building, rescue Otacon and meet with Meryl without alerts, weapons (except Nikita) or radar on Extreme difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: The Best Is Yet to Come
achievements.description: After encountering Sniper Wolf in the Underground Passage, collect the PSG-1 in the Armory and return to the Underground Passage without alerts, weapons or radar on Extreme difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I'm Still In a Dream, Snake Eater
achievements.description: Retrieve your equipment and reach the Underground Passage without alerts, damage, weapons or radar on Extreme difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: When Heavens Divide
achievements.description: Find Metal Gear REX and input all three PAL codes without alerts or radar or using weapons except during rat hunt on Extreme difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Got Your Stealth Right Here!
achievements.description: Survive for five minutes in high alert status on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Damn It, Otacon! Get a Grip!
achievements.description: Raise your grip strength to level 3
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Camera Shy
achievements.description: Destroy every possible camera in the game on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Who Ya Gonna Call? Luigi!
achievements.description: Exorcise all 40 ghosts in one session
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Let's Call Him 'Little Boss'
achievements.description: Complete Boss Survival
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Bigger Boss
achievements.description: Complete Boss Survival on Hard difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: You Are Above Even the Boss
achievements.description: Complete Boss Survival in 30 minutes on Hard difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Hope You Can Furgive Me
achievements.description: Collect all dog tags on Very Easy difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Howl I Live Without You?
achievements.description: Collect all dog tags on Easy difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: The Pug Life
achievements.description: Collect all dog tags on Normal difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: A New Leash on Life
achievements.description: Collect all dog tags on Hard difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: One Ruff Day
achievements.description: Collect all dog tags on Extreme difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Dogs of War
achievements.description: Collect all dog tags in the game
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Infantry
achievements.description: Complete the game on Very Easy or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Rookie
achievements.description: Complete the game on Easy or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Soldier
achievements.description: Complete the game on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Green Beret
achievements.description: Complete the game on Hard or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Foxhound
achievements.description: Complete the game on Extreme difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Age Hasn't Slowed You Down One Bit
achievements.description: Complete the game in under 3 hours on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Never Be Game Over
achievements.description: Complete the game without using a continue and no more than 5 saves on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: That Ninja
achievements.description: Complete the game with no more than 8 alerts on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Peace Walker
achievements.description: Complete the game with 0 enemies killed on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: Not THAT Hungry
achievements.description: Complete the game without using a ration on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: I Don't Like to Waste Bullets
achievements.description: Complete the game using weapons no more than 400 times on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: The Trial to Survive
achievements.description: Complete the game without taking more than 5 life bars of damage on Normal or higher difficulty
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior

achievements.title: The Greatest Soldier of the 21st Century
achievements.description: Complete the game with a Big Boss rank with no radar
achievements.author: WilHiteWarrior
